title: Create: structures overhaul
description: Create: structures overhaul - a structure expansion mod focused on enchasing world generation with create mod installed.
body:
# Create: Structures Overhaul

[![Get GodLike host with discount](https://i.ibb.co/rJvr5Jp/Banner-Curseforge-83780-px-2x.webp)](
https://affiliate.godlike.host/csom)

**Last Update:**

*   **Version:** 1.3.0 & 1.3.1 – Spooky Update & Bug Fixes
*   **Date:** 2025-10-24 - 2025-10-25
*   **Highlights:** Added five new Halloween-themed structures; improved loot balance across most structures; increased generation rates; fixed loot in towers; fixed graveyard spawn.
*   **Status:** Full bug-fixed release

**Create: Structures Overhaul** is a world generation expansion for **Create**, adding new structures and enhancing exploration. It integrates seamlessly with Create’s mechanics to enrich your worlds with immersive, biome-themed content.

[![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-Support%20Me-29ABE0?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/denmoth)  [![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/BCXqNfPnSh)  [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Visit-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/denmoth/create_structures_overhaul)  [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-Visit-FF7F50?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/denmoth/projects/create-structures-overhaul)


***

## Features

*   Biome-based structure spawning across all biomes.
*   Fully locatable using `/locate structure`.
*   Optional **Biomes O' Plenty** compatibility via the official integration:  
    [Create: Structures Overhaul – BOP Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-structures-overhaul-bop-integration)
*   Blends naturally with environments and matches Create’s aesthetics.
*   Lightweight and optimized for performance.

***

## Requirements

*   Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1 / Forge 1.19.2+ / NeoForge 1.21.1
*   [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) mod installed
*   For Fabric users, it is recommended to install this [texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-new-copper-stuffs) to see the newest Create copper block textures.

***

## License

MIT – free to fork, create addons, and include in modpacks.
